hero.title: Welcome to the era of automation

whatIs.title: What is RPA?
whatIs.paragraph1: RPA automation is a powerful tool that lets you boost your business performance. We're not just talking about removing repetitive tasks, but about optimizing the vital processes that define your organization's success. What if the processes that matter most — financial, logistical or decision-making — could run with surgical precision and unmatched speed?
whatIs.paragraph2: The impact would be significant: faster response times, lower operating costs, greater execution accuracy and, most importantly, the ability to focus human resources on activities that truly drive innovation and strategic business growth.
whatIs.rocketbotParagraph1: Rocketbot is the ideal RPA platform to drive digital transformation in companies of any size. With global RPA investment now exceeding $60 billion, Rocketbot has positioned itself as a key solution, helping more than 500 customers and automating over 5,000 processes worldwide. Its ability to run processes agilely and efficiently lets it manage up to 10 tasks in parallel within the same environment, accelerating operations without raising costs.
whatIs.rocketbotParagraph2: What truly sets Rocketbot apart is its flexibility and scalability. Built in Python, it offers seamless integration with different environments — on-premise or in the cloud — adapting to the specific needs of every organization, from small businesses to large enterprises. Its focus on democratizing automation also lets anyone in an organization, regardless of technical experience, build and manage robots autonomously. With affordable, expandable licenses from desktop to servers, Rocketbot guarantees an optimized ROI, providing companies with a solution that grows with them without overpaying to run critical processes in parallel.

hero.title: Real-time monitoring for your RPA robots
hero.subtitle: Catch failures before your clients do. Monitor executions, get alerts, and analyze the performance of every automation in production.

features.heading: Everything you need to keep your bots under control

alerts.title: Real-time alerts
alerts.description: Get instant notifications whenever a robot fails, stops, or shows anomalous behavior.

dashboard.title: Metrics dashboard
dashboard.description: Visualize runs, processing times, success rates and errors in a single panel.

logs.title: Centralized logs
logs.description: Access the logs of all your robots in one place. Search, filter and analyze without connecting to each machine.

history.title: Execution history
history.description: Review the full history of every robot: when it ran, how long it took, and whether it finished correctly.

origin.heading: Born from real-world experience
origin.paragraph: After deploying 60+ RPA robots in production, we know the hardest part isn't building the bot — it's keeping it running. Monitor was born from that need: a simple tool to know what's happening with your automations without having to check every machine manually.

cta.title: Keep your robots under control
cta.subtitle: Monitor all your automations in a single place.

detection.title: Automatic detection
detection.description: Identify objects, people, events and patterns in your videos automatically with advanced AI models.

insights.title: Automated insights
insights.description: Generate reports and metrics from the content of your videos with no manual processing.

processing.title: Efficient processing
processing.description: Analyze large volumes of video quickly and at scale in the cloud.

integration.title: Integrates with your systems
integration.description: Connect analysis results with your existing dashboards, ERPs or alerting systems.

origin.heading: AI applied to real problems
origin.paragraph: Analysis combines our experience in artificial intelligence with the real needs of businesses. From manufacturing quality control to security analysis, video contains valuable information that today gets lost. We turn it into data.

cta.title: Discover what your videos can tell you
cta.subtitle: Video analysis powered by artificial intelligence.

hero.title: The operating system for software and RPA consultancies
hero.subtitle: Stop running your consultancy on WhatsApp and Excel. Centralize projects, resources, estimates and support in a single place.

cta.title: Start running your consultancy the professional way
cta.subtitle: 30 days free. No credit card required. Up and running in minutes.

problem.heading: Does your consultancy struggle with these problems?
problem.subtitle: If you run a software or RPA consultancy, this probably sounds familiar.

scopeCreep.title: Uncontrolled scope creep
scopeCreep.description: Projects grow without anyone noticing until the margin is gone.

availability.title: You don't know who's available
availability.description: You assign people to projects without real visibility into their workload.

excelProposals.title: Proposals in Excel
excelProposals.description: Quotes live in spreadsheets that get lost and don't connect with the actual projects.

whatsappClients.title: Clients ask via WhatsApp
whatsappClients.description: "How's my project going?" is the question you get the most, and you never have the answer at hand.

features.heading: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: Every feature designed to solve real problems consultancies face.

resourcePlanning.title: Resource Planning
resourcePlanning.description: See your team's availability and assign people to projects without overloading anyone.
resourcePlanning.alt: Resource planner view showing team availability

ganttTimeline.title: Gantt and Timeline
ganttTimeline.description: Plan and visualize your projects with interactive Gantt charts. Your clients see progress in real time.
ganttTimeline.alt: Gantt and Timeline showing project progress

helpDesk.title: Help Desk
helpDesk.description: Handle post-delivery support with tickets, SLAs and an integrated client portal.
helpDesk.alt: Help desk with tickets and SLA management

dashboardKpis.title: Dashboard and KPIs
dashboardKpis.description: Real-time metrics: profitability, utilization, progress and more.
dashboardKpis.alt: Main dashboard with KPIs and real-time metrics

licenses.title: License and Asset Management
licenses.description: Centrally manage your clients' licenses, domains and digital assets.
licenses.alt: Centralized management of licenses and digital assets

differentiator.heading: Built by a consultancy, for consultancies
differentiator.paragraph1: Robotipy was born out of our own need. We're an RPA consultancy with 60+ projects across 8 countries. We built this tool because none of the existing ones solved our real problems.
differentiator.paragraph2: This isn't a generic tool retrofitted for consulting. It's a tool born from the trenches of running automation, software development and tech consulting projects.

pricingPreview.heading: Simple plans, no surprises
pricingPreview.subtitle: 30 days free. No credit card required. Clients (Guests) don't count as paid users.

pricingPage.heading: Simple plans for consultancies of any size
pricingPage.subtitle: 30 days free. No credit card required. Clients (Guests) don't count as paid users.

trial.question: Is there a free trial?
trial.answer: Yes, every plan includes a 30-day free trial. You don't need to enter a credit card to get started.

guests.question: Do Clients (Guests) count as paid users?
guests.answer: No. Clients accessing the client portal are Guests and don't count as paid users. You can invite unlimited clients at no extra cost.

switchPlan.question: Can I change plans at any time?
switchPlan.answer: Yes, you can change plans whenever you want. If you upgrade, we prorate the difference. If you downgrade, the change takes effect on your next billing cycle.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express). For annual plans we also offer bank transfer.

annualDiscount.question: Is there a discount for annual billing?
annualDiscount.answer: Yes, annual billing is 20% cheaper than monthly billing.

noInstall.question: Do I need to install anything?
noInstall.answer: No. Robotipy Projects is 100% web-based. All you need is a modern browser to access it from any device.

bottomCta.title: Start running your consultancy the professional way
bottomCta.subtitle: 30 days free. No credit card required.

recursos.title: Never lose a project because you didn't know who was available
recursos.subtitle: See your team's real availability and make assignment decisions based on data, not guesswork.

capacityView.title: Team capacity view
capacityView.description: See every team member's workload on a visual timeline. Spot who has availability and who's at the limit.

smartAssign.title: Smart assignment
smartAssign.description: Assign people to projects based on their skills, availability and current workload. Avoid over-allocation automatically.

forecast.title: Forecast planning
forecast.description: Project resource demand 30, 60 and 90 days out. Anticipate bottlenecks before they become problems.

alerts.title: Capacity alerts
alerts.description: Get notified when a resource is over-assigned or when there's idle capacity you could put to work.

recursos.problemDescription: In a consultancy, the most valuable resource is your team's time. Without visibility into real capacity, you end up turning down projects because 'everyone's busy' or accepting projects without realizing you're already at the limit. The result: burnout, late deliveries, and unhappy clients. Resource planning gives you the control you need to grow without chaos.

soporte.title: The post-delivery support your clients deserve
soporte.subtitle: Handle support tickets, meet SLAs, and give your clients a professional channel to report issues.

ticketPortal.title: Client ticket portal
ticketPortal.description: Clients create support tickets from their portal. No emails, no WhatsApp. Everything logged and traceable.

slas.title: SLA management
slas.description: Define response and resolution times per ticket type and client. The system alerts you when an SLA is at risk.

assignment.title: Assignment and escalation
assignment.description: Auto-assign tickets by type, priority or team availability. Escalate when needed.

metrics.title: Support metrics
metrics.description: Track response times, resolution times, customer satisfaction and support team workload.

soporte.problemDescription: After delivering a project, support turns into chaos. Clients write on WhatsApp, email, or call developers directly. There's no record of what was requested, when it was solved, or how long it took. A professional help desk formalizes your post-delivery support, improves client satisfaction, and gives you data to make decisions about maintenance contracts.

portalClientes.title: Transparency that builds trust with your clients
portalClientes.subtitle: Give every client a portal where they can see project progress, approve deliverables, and communicate with your team.

customPortal.title: Custom portal per client
customPortal.description: Each client gets their own space where they only see their projects, progress, documents and communications.

realtimeUpdates.title: Real-time updates
realtimeUpdates.description: Clients see project progress update automatically. No need to send manual reports.

approval.title: Deliverable approval
approval.description: Clients approve or request changes directly from the portal. Everything is logged with dates and comments.

centralComms.title: Centralized communication
centralComms.description: Replace WhatsApp and email threads with communication organized by project and deliverable.

portalClientes.problemDescription: Every week you get the same message: "How's my project going?". You reply on WhatsApp, hunt for the info across different places, put together a summary, and send it. The next day, another client asks the same thing. The client portal ends this cycle. Your clients have direct access to the information they need, when they need it. The result: fewer interruptions for your team, more client trust, and a professional image that sets you apart.

cotizador.title: From proposal to project without copy-paste
cotizador.subtitle: Create professional proposals with detailed estimates and turn them into active projects with a single click.

templates.title: Proposal templates
templates.description: Use ready-made templates for different project types (RPA, development, consulting). Customize and send in minutes.

estimation.title: Detailed estimation
estimation.description: Break the project down into phases, tasks and resources. The quote builder calculates costs, margins and timelines automatically.

toProject.title: From proposal to project
toProject.description: When the client approves, turn the proposal into a project with one click. Phases, tasks and assignments are already set up.

versionHistory.title: Version history
versionHistory.description: Every change to the proposal is recorded. Compare versions and see what changed between the original and final proposal.

cotizador.problemDescription: Proposals are made in Excel, Word or Google Docs. Each one starts from scratch or gets copied from a previous one (with data that isn't up to date). When the client approves, someone has to create the project manually, re-entering all the information. This doesn't scale. With the quote builder, the proposal is the beginning of the project. Everything flows without friction and without losing information.
